programme.title: Shepherds Around The World

programme.title: The One I Loved
programme.desc: Erkan, who comes from a wealthy background, is assigned to complete his military service in a remote earthquake-prone town, where he meets Dicle. They get married, and he brings her from her modest world into his life in the capital. Helin Kandemir, Aytac Sasmaz.

programme.title: A.B.I.
programme.desc: Dogan leaves his family's dark and troubled past behind and runs away to start a new life with a new identity, but the past refuses to leave him alone and forces him to return once again when some secrets come to light. Kenan Imirzalioglu, Afra Saracoglu.

programme.title: Abdel Ghani's Daughters
programme.desc: Three sisters team up to stop their older sister's forced wedding, but each of their plans fails, exposing family conflicts and the social pressures tied to marriage within the household. Abdullah Al Turkmany, Maram Al Bloushi.

programme.title: Our Club
programme.desc: Debate An interactive space where fans share their passion for Saudi football by discussing league matches, talking about their favorite clubs, and exploring the history and meaning of championships. Abd Al Rahman Al Hamidy, Abd Al Rahman Al Hamidy.

programme.title: Studio 23
programme.desc: A group of employees at a struggling TV channel work to prove their skills to an owner determined to keep the channel running despite all its challenges. Habeeb Al Habeeb, Abdulaziz Al Nassar.

programme.title: Plan B
programme.desc: When the theater group is exposed to fraud, its members unite with the intention of seeking retribution and foiling the deceitful schemes of unscrupulous businessmen. Ibrahim Al Hajaj, Mila Elzhrany, Ibrahim Al Hajjaj, Mila Al Zahrani.

programme.desc: Bilal and Tara, two Londoners with clashing personalities, find themselves forced into a fake marriage by a series of unexpected events. Sonia Rathee, Harshvardhan Rane, Shammi Aulakh, Tariq Chacha, Shafali Chung, Samar Iqbal, Sanyuktha Chawla Shaikh.

programme.title: The Bitter Harvest
programme.desc: Zeba is forced to question everything when the man she depends on begins to change in unexpected ways. Caught between family pressure and emotional detachment, she struggles to hold her life together. Sanam Saeed, Emmad Irfani.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Ved
programme.desc: After a painful breakup, Satya spirals into alcoholism. His life begins to change when he marries Shravani, a neighbor whose unwavering love helps him rebuild his life. Riteish Deshmukh, Shiva Nirvana, Riteish Deshmukh, Genelia Deshmukh, Jiya Shankar, Ashok Saraf, Vidyadhar Joshi.

programme.title: Parineetii
programme.desc: Two loyal friends, who are known for their unconditional support of each other in all circumstances, are confronted with a complicated scenario after both end up married to the same man. Aanchal Sahu, Ankur Verma.

programme.title: Daddy Is Here
programme.desc: When Hesham loses his job in the COVID-19 pandemic, he becomes a stay-at-home dad, relying on his wife's income. Faced with financial struggles and his daughter deeming him unnecessary, he resolves to apply an unexpected solution. Akram Hosny, Nisreen Amin.

programme.title: Our Father's House
programme.desc: Two divorced sisters live with their children at their father's house, where they face many problems because of their failure in raising their children. Hayat Al Fahad, Soad Abd Allah.

programme.title: Crystal
programme.desc: A severe conflict arises between Alia, a famous fashion designer, and Fay, the daughter of her house guard, who is trying to become like her. programme.title: Lost In Someone's Love
programme.desc: Sai Joshi dreams of joining the Nagpur Medical College and becoming a doctor one day, but her steps are hindered when her family forces her to marry an IPS officer who is in love with another woman, so they make a secret deal that comforts both of them. Ayesha Singh, Neil Bhatt, Aishwarya Sharma Bhatt, Sanjivani Amit Takkar, Kishori Shahane, Jaydeep Sen, Rajesh Chawla.

programme.desc: Despite leaving his love behind and starting fresh, the surprising presence of Yamac's mother disturbs all of his feelings asking him to return and aid the family legacy. Aras Bulut Iynemli, Erkan Kolcak Kostendil.

With her marriage falling apart, she chooses to reclaim control of her life by returning to the medical career she once left behind. Demet Evgar, Mehmet Yilmaz Ak, Bugra Gülsoy, Ecem Özkaya, Füsun Demirel, Bugra Gulsoy, Ecem Ozkaya, Fusun Demirel, Elit Andac Cam, Demirhan Demircioglu, Neslihan Yesilyurt, Ayca Uzum.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: Al King
programme.desc: Once a clean boxer, Hamza is pulled into a ruthless, no-rules world when his half-brother draws him into the orbit of a corrupt, influential figure, where survival hinges on taking back what's his and protecting those he loves. Mohamed Emam, Amr Abdel Galil.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.desc: S1 E2 يتشاجر رأفت مع دهبية ويحاول الضغط عليها للرجوع إليه ولكن الحاج أنس يتدخل ويدافع عنها. أما باسم، فيبدي امتعاضه من تصرفات زوج أمه ويعتبره سارقاً لميراث أبيه.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E3 يتسابق أنس ورأفت لطلب ود دهبية ويواصلان محاولاتهما دون يأس كما تسعى دهبية لمساعدة سلمى في تحقيق مشروعها ولكن تحدث مشادة كلامية بين سلمى وباسم بعد اكتشافه استئجارها لإحدى ممتلكات والدته دون علمه. من ناحية ثانية، تحاول سلمى إقناع أخيها بالهرب.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E4 يحاول حسن التودد إلى دهبية ولكن حظه لن يكون أفضل من حظ أنس ورأفت، فيما يحاول طارق الحصول على وظيفة ويرفض العمل مع والده. أما عز، فيتقصى سراً حول جريمة القتل.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E5 توشك جهود رأفت أن تثمر، وتبدأ دهبية بالتفكير باقتراحاته. يخبر حسن والده برغبته بالزواج من دهبية. أما باسم، فيطرح على والدته فكرة بيع ممتلكاتها.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S2026 E47 برنامج مميز يجلب لكم الترفيه ويستضيف أكثر الشخصيات المشهورة المفضلة لديكم.
programme.title: كلا

programme.title: A Journey Of Love
programme.desc: A fancy rich man finds love in a hopeless place when he meets up with a town girl of great beauty. Aayush Sharma, Warina Hussain, Caroline Wilde, Danny Mahoney, Sammy John Heaney, Abhiraj Minawala, Niren Bhatt.

programme.title: Prem Deewane
programme.desc: When Radha's family refused her marriage to Manohar, her uncle attempted to help them. He advised to kidnap a wealthy man and demand a big ransom and take the money. But he had a bad intention to hurt them. Pooja Bhatt, Vivek Mushran, Ashok Saraf, Prem Chopra, Bharat Bhushan, Sachin.

programme.title: Gunjan Saxena: The Kargil Girl
programme.desc: Gunjan Saxena seeks to be a pilot as she has a passion for flying. She experiences many obstacles and a reservation society to achieve her dream and becomes the first Indian female pilot in combat. Janhvi Kapoor, Pankaj Tripathi, Angad Bedi, Manav Vij, Ayesha Raza Mishra, Ali Khan AK, Nikhil Mehrotra.

programme.title: My Fat Wife
programme.desc: An overweight girl gets used to the constant rejection of the opposite sex because of her outward appearance, but when her path crosses with a wrestling superstar, she realizes that love knows no law. Rytasha Rathore, Prince Narula.

programme.title: When We Met
programme.desc: Two old friends dream of marrying their children from each other whom love knows its way to them, but circumstances separate them and the beloved seeks revenge. Muzammil Desai.

programme.title: Aatma: Feel It Around You
programme.desc: After a single mother starts her new life with her six years old daughter, strange and scary things start to attack them, so the mother must fight to keep herself and her daughter safe. Bipasha Basu, Doyel Dhawan, Jaideep Ahlawat, Padam Bhola, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Suparn Verma, Suparn Verma.
